subject: A golden glyph-covered elemental creature crouched on ruined masonry as floating stone structures drift through a hazy sky
description: A sleek, frog-like elemental body is entirely covered in interlocking golden geometric glyphs and maze-like inscriptions. It crouches on crumbling brick architecture — part of a ruined or floating city — while electrical energy crackles along its form. Broken stone platforms and dark floating monoliths are scattered across the misty background. Vegetation grows from the ruins. The palette is warm gold against cool grey-blue sky.
foreground: golden glyph-covered elemental crouched on brick ruins
background: floating stone ruins and dark monoliths in hazy sky
emotion: tense, coiled energy — creature at rest but vibrating with power
